content: Your code is already correct. It splits the string into an array of words using whitespace as a delimiter, then further splits each element to get the product details and price. The price for the product is obtained from the `priceList` map by its name (productDetails[1]). The order price is calculated by multiplying the quantity in the order with the price of the product.
